table_description: Stores customer bank account information including account type, branch location, and current balance.

columns.name: account_id
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier assigned to each bank account.

columns.name: customer_name
columns.description: Full name of the customer who owns the bank account.

columns.name: account_type
columns.description: Type of bank account such as savings or checking.

columns.name: branch_city
columns.description: City where the bank branch managing the account is located.

columns.name: opening_date
columns.description: Date when the bank account was opened.

columns.name: current_balance
columns.description: Current available balance in the account.

table_description: Stores loan account information associated with customer accounts including loan type, principal amount, and repayment terms.

columns.name: loan_id
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for each loan record.

columns.name: account_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the account associated with the loan.

columns.name: loan_type
columns.description: Category of loan such as home loan, auto loan, or personal loan.

columns.name: loan_amount
columns.description: Total principal amount borrowed under the loan agreement.

columns.name: interest_rate
columns.description: Annual interest rate applied to the loan expressed as a percentage.

columns.name: loan_start_date
columns.description: Date when the loan repayment period began.

columns.name: loan_end_date
columns.description: Date when the loan is scheduled to be fully repaid.

table_description: Records financial transactions performed on customer accounts including debits and credits.

columns.name: transaction_id
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for each transaction.

columns.name: account_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the account on which the transaction occurred.

columns.name: transaction_date
columns.description: Date when the transaction was executed.

columns.name: transaction_type
columns.description: Type of transaction such as debit (money withdrawn) or credit (money deposited).

columns.name: description
columns.description: Short textual explanation describing the purpose or nature of the transaction.
